description: Retrieve-discover-writeback controller: audited source-free memory first; source-free discovery fallback on miss; sandbox replay verification; local episodic memory writeback.

provenance_policy.global_archive_inputs: E145 eligible traces only: source_free, untainted, audit-clean, replay-verified, positive-depth
provenance_policy.local_writeback: sandbox replay-verified immediately; recorded as e146_local_provisional until promoted through archive-grade finalize/audit tooling

validation.name: memory_only_tu93
validation.note: Memory retrieval + chaining + replay verification end-to-end from the audited archive (re-run 2026-07-01).

validation.name: controlled_discovery_writeback_m0r0
validation.note: Plumbing test only: memory retrieval was disabled by threshold, a known source-free trace was supplied through the discovery-command interface, E146 replay-verified it and wrote it to local episodic memory.

validation.name: agent_discovery_adapter_contract
validation.note: scripts/run_e146_agent_discovery.sh validated by stubbed contract tests (tests/e146/test_agent_discovery_adapter.py): env contract -> frontier replay -> TASK.md generation -> solved.json harvest.

negative_result.claim: Deterministic cold-start discovery primitives crack 0 new source-free levels.
negative_result.evidence: experiments/e146/sourcefree_primitives.py grew to 3,068 lines / 57 top-level callables / 13 candidate generators (lattice/center corridors, bounded-preserving and fresh-replay-survivor searches, temporal phase corridors, path detours, sandbox frontier exploration, first-level macro tournaments, code-world discriminators, go-explore archives, hidden-click-state probes, ReAct-style tool sequences, semiring macro search with Fibonacci/Zeckendorf priors). None produced a replay-verified level gain on any unsolved frontier.
negative_result.interpretation: Confirms E131/E132: the binding constraint is DISCOVERY. ARC-AGI-3 wins are goal-as-procedure (ordered protocols), not states reachable by blind macro/prior enumeration. The only solver to break the wall source-free is the live coding agent (16/25 opus arm), so E146's discovery fallback is now wired to it (claude_ewm_agent adapter); the primitive pile is frozen as this documented boundary.
negative_result.status: frozen -- kept as searchable prior art; cheap primitives may still serve as fast pre-checks before paying for an agent stage

tests.command: python -m pytest tests/e146/ tests/e145/test_sourcefree_controller.py tests/e144/test_full_run_controller.py tests/e143/test_transition_miner.py -q
